patches.replace: This is well-documented storm-suppression physics (Schlegel & Füllekrug 1999, JGR 104, 10111; Nickolaenko & Hayakawa 2002)
patches.rationale: ISS-644: Adds Schlegel & Füllekrug (1999) as the primary storm-specific citation for G3+ Schumann suppression, supplementing the general Nickolaenko & Hayakawa reference.

patches.find: The dome gets the base frequency wrong by 2.8×, then claims credit for perturbations around it.
patches.replace: Critically, the dome's own Live Power Dashboard scores this WIN as 'Unscored — no G3+ storm observed since deployment' — meaning by the dome's own automated monitoring, no qualifying storm has been observed, yet the claim appears in the confirmed WIN count. A test that has never been run cannot be confirmed. The dome gets the base frequency wrong by 2.8×, then claims credit for perturbations around it.
patches.rationale: ISS-645: Adds the Live Power Dashboard 'Unscored' status as explicit evidence. The dome's own infrastructure confirms this test has never run, making 'confirmation' impossible.
